prestazioni: Engine: Kryon KR16 2.2L Turbo Diesel (Kryotech Varicor400 engine code) – Forced induction upgrade with Garrett GT2260VK turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter from MagnaFlow for Euro 6 compliance.

Fuel System: Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump (2,000 bar) with Denso G4S 320cc injectors, controlled via a Link G4X Storm ECU with custom dyno-tuned maps for E85 compatibility (30% ethanol blend) and a 3-bar MAP sensor for boost pressure monitoring up to 2.2 bar.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 800lb/in front springs and 600lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates from SuperPro (part #SPF5000K) for -2.5 degrees front camber, and a Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar (part #BMR75) to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering on tarmac rally stages.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Liberty Walk LB-SAFARI kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated LED light bar, and rear diffuser) extended by 50mm per side to accommodate 285/45R22 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Rotiform LAS-R 22x11 wheels (ET35 offset).

Aerodynamics: Custom carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts (feeding the Garrett turbo) and a rear wing from APR Performance (GTC-300 model, 30mm risers) generating 120kg of downforce at 160km/h, paired with a front splitter from Seibon Carbon with adjustable canards.

Interior & Lighting: Full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and Recaro Pole Position seats (part #208020) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, 3.2mm wall thickness) painted in Tata Gold Metallic, and a full LED lighting upgrade with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (6000K) and Philips Ultinon Pro9000 fog lights.
